name: fazo-backend
description: FAZO Dental Technology - Node.js Backend API

scripts.build: cd ../faz00 && npm install && npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.resolve('../faz00/dist');const dest=path.resolve('./public');fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('Frontend copied to backend/public');"
